meaning: n.(杂技、舞蹈等演员穿的) 紧身连衣裤
examples: To make her seem athletic, I need to give her a leotard.
In 2008, Nastia Liukin's leotard for the Beijing games had 184 crystals on it.
It shows her in asymmetrical leotard and high-heels, with two other female dancers.
So what is she like, this woman who once turned up at an awards ceremony wearing a tiger-striped leotard?
One woman looks positively majestic in her green spandex leotard and wild flaxen hair, posing on a great white horse.
